Description:
Maximum Water Management and Aesthetic Value. This is RHIVE's standard gutter solution, engineered for optimal drainage and curb appeal. This seamless K-Style system provides high capacity for residential roof areas, protecting your foundation and landscaping while blending seamlessly with your fascia line.
RHIVE CORE COMMITMENT & GUARANTEE
INSTALLATION WARRANTY: RHIVE No-Leak Gutter Guarantee - covers all repairs for leaks caused by improper original installation of the gutter segments and end caps.
MATERIALS WARRANTY: 20-Year Manufacturer Warranty against peeling, cracking, or blistering of the aluminum finish.
EXECUTION BLUEPRINT & MATERIALS
RHIVE QUALITY STANDARD: All components listed below define the minimum material standard. RHIVE will only substitute materials with those of the same kind and quality as outlined in the NOTE ON SUBSTITUTIONS below.
GUTTER TROUGH (5” K-Style): Heavy-gauge, continuous 5-inch K-Style aluminum trough, custom-formed on-site to minimize seams and maximize water flow capacity.
DOWN SPOUT (2” x 3” Standard): Standard 2x3-inch downspouts installed to optimize vertical water discharge and direct water safely away from the foundation.
FASTENERS & HANGERS: Heavy-duty, hidden screw-in hangers are installed every 24 inches (exceeding standard 30-inch spacing) for superior structural integrity and defense against heavy snow and ice loads.
SEALANT: Commercial-grade, UV-stable gutter sealant is applied to all joints, end caps, and outlets, ensuring a permanent, watertight seal that resists thermal movement.
END CAPS & OUTLETS: Custom end caps and drain outlets are sealed and installed at optimal locations to ensure all water is collected and channeled effectively.
FINAL PITCH & ALIGNMENT: The gutter system is installed with the required pitch (slope) to ensure water flows efficiently toward the downspouts, preventing standing water and debris buildup.
RHIVE QUALITY STANDARDS & NOTES
NOTE ON SUBSTITUTIONS: RHIVE Construction may substitute materials with those of the same kind and quality only if the specified material is unavailable and will ensure all manufacturer warranty requirements remain fully intact.

Critical Penetration Defense Upgrade. This specialized service focuses on replacing degraded pipe flashings (pipe jacks/vents) with high-performance components and sealing them with superior materials. We eliminate common leak points, ensuring a permanent, water-tight seal designed for extreme longevity.
The RHIVE Quantum Defense Protocol
Service Scope: Full replacement of existing, failing pipe boots/jacks, restoration of shingle integrity around the penetration, and application of a long-term sealant. This is a permanent repair for a critical leak vulnerability.
Component Upgrade: Installation of Full Metal Pipe Jacks (painted to match the roof or adjacent flashing). These replace common plastic, lead, or neoprene versions that degrade rapidly under UV exposure.
Pipe Jack Installation: The new metal jack is correctly set and secured, ensuring the flashing is integrated seamlessly with the surrounding shingles for proper water shedding.
Execution Blueprint
UV-Rated Sealant Application: Application of a high-performance, Clear UV-Rated Sealant around the base of the new pipe collar and the pipe. This flexible material is designed for long-term maintenance.
Oxidation & UV Defense (Painting): The new metal pipe jack and boot sealant are fully painted with a protective coating to shield the metal from oxidation (rust) and the sealant from early UV degradation, ensuring maximum service life.
Shingle Restoration: Any disturbed or damaged shingles immediately adjacent to the penetration are secured, sealed, or replaced to guarantee a continuous water-tight roofing plane.

Surgical Repair & Water-Shedding Integrity. This service provides a permanent solution for localized shingle damage. We surgically replace missing, cracked, or compromised shingles to restore your roof's critical water-shedding integrity and seamlessly integrate the repair with the existing roof structure.

The RHIVE System-Restore Protocol
Targeted Removal: A surgical removal of only the failed shingles and any compromised adjacent materials is performed to preserve the integrity of the surrounding roof plane.
Material Sourcing & Color Variance Acknowledgment: We source the closest possible match for your existing shingles. However, an exact color match is impossible. This is due to the natural weathering and UV exposure of the existing shingles, combined with unavoidable variations in manufacturer dye lots. This initial color variance is a standard and unavoidable characteristic of any targeted roof repair.
Integrated Weatherproof Bond: A monolithic, weatherproof bond is created through proper nailing and manual sealing, fully integrating the repair into the roof system to resist all future weather conditions.

Execution Blueprint
DAMAGE ASSESSMENT: We inspect the affected area to identify any potential underlying decking damage and define the precise scope required for a permanent repair.
PRECISION INSTALLATION: New shingles are installed with the correct offset and exposure, secured with 6 nails per shingle for maximum wind resistance and system integrity.
FINAL SEALING: A continuous bead of asphalt roof cement is applied to all new and disturbed shingle edges. This critical final step creates an immediate, permanent, water-tight bond that defends against both moisture intrusion and future wind uplift.
